_comment: WDI 指标别名配置 - 更新版（使用 Data360 API 实际代码）

WB_WDI_NY_GNP_PCAP_CD.name: GNI per capita, Atlas method (current US$)
WB_WDI_NY_GNP_PCAP_CD.name_cn: 人均 GNI（阿特拉斯法，现价美元）

WB_WDI_NV_AGR_TOTL_ZS.name: Agriculture, forestry, and fishing, value added (% of GDP)
WB_WDI_NV_AGR_TOTL_ZS.name_cn: 农业、林业和渔业增加值占 GDP 比重

WB_WDI_NV_IND_TOTL_ZS.name: Industry (including construction), value added (% of GDP)
WB_WDI_NV_IND_TOTL_ZS.name_cn: 工业增加值（含建筑业）占 GDP 比重

WB_WDI_NV_IND_MANF_ZS.name: Manufacturing, value added (% of GDP)
WB_WDI_NV_IND_MANF_ZS.name_cn: 制造业增加值占 GDP 比重

WB_WDI_NV_SRV_TOTL_ZS.name: Services, value added (% of GDP)
WB_WDI_NV_SRV_TOTL_ZS.name_cn: 服务业增加值占 GDP 比重

WB_WDI_FP_CPI_TOTL_ZG.name: Inflation, consumer prices (annual %)
WB_WDI_FP_CPI_TOTL_ZG.name_cn: 通胀率（消费者价格指数，年%）

aliases: trade as a share of gdp
WB_WDI_NE_TRD_GNFS_ZS.name: Trade (% of GDP)
WB_WDI_NE_TRD_GNFS_ZS.name_cn: 商品和服务贸易总额占 GDP 比重
WB_WDI_NE_TRD_GNFS_ZS.definition: 贸易总额是出口和进口的总和（商品和服务），按现价计算
WB_WDI_NE_TRD_GNFS_ZS.note: 最常用的贸易开放度指标

aliases: merchandise trade as a share of gdp
商品贸易占 GDP 比重
WB_WDI_TG_VAL_TOTL_GD_ZS.name: Merchandise trade (% of GDP)
WB_WDI_TG_VAL_TOTL_GD_ZS.name_cn: 商品贸易占 GDP 比重
WB_WDI_TG_VAL_TOTL_GD_ZS.definition: 商品贸易总额（出口 + 进口）占 GDP 比重，仅包括货物贸易，不包括服务

WB_WDI_NE_EXP_GNFS_ZS.name: Exports of goods and services (% of GDP)
WB_WDI_NE_EXP_GNFS_ZS.name_cn: 商品和服务出口占 GDP 比重

WB_WDI_NE_IMP_GNFS_ZS.name: Imports of goods and services (% of GDP)
WB_WDI_NE_IMP_GNFS_ZS.name_cn: 商品和服务进口占 GDP 比重

WB_WDI_SL_UEM_TOTL_ZS.name: Unemployment, total (% of total labor force)
